note: S1 modeled FAITHFULLY as her real charge-counter (kit text: 'Activates on Full Charge; effect changes by attack count, phases do not stack'): a single per-full-charge phase counter (chargeCounter trigger) firing 283.03% single at the 3rd charge, 565% distributed at the 6th, 848.03% distributed at the 9th, looping. Her BURST lowers those thresholds to 1/2/3 for 10s (gated on HER OWN burst cast, not the team FB window) -> procs cluster into her burst window; the +50% Full Burst then applies per-proc by landing timing (dealDamage). This RETIRES the old hitCount:10 + noFb approximation (2026-07-15): noFb was an unobserved fudge, and 'burst tripling barely materializes' was WRONG -- she does ~4.5x proc damage in burst (3x rate x1.5 FB). Post-patch S1 values 283.03/565/848.03 (from 250.47/500/750.47) pinned here. CHARGE TIME MEASURED (video, N3 = docs/probes/714 noon/3.mp4, she is camera-focus): her charge bar cycles ~0.70s (1.3-1.4 charges/s) both in and out of FB -> charFixes.chargeFrames 18->42. The datamined 18 (0.30s) was ~2.3x too fast (bad datamine); the old hitCount:10 masked it (two canceling errors: too-fast charge x too-few-procs-per-charge). OPEN (2026-07-15): at the correct charge time + faithful counter she grades ~0.73 (T1) -- a residual ~27% under-model remains. Candidates: her in-burst charge-speed / charge cadence, non-core normal value (DBG max 1.30M vs real 1.55M popup, buff-state dependent), or proc-count detail in the burst window. Needs a focused re-audit; do NOT re-fudge the cadence. AUTOFIRE CONFIRMED (no release latency); charFixes.noBoltRecovery kept. Her 150% charge cap matches DB.
